query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS host_accounts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  hostListingId INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  email VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  passwordHash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  lastLoginAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (hostListingId) REFERENCES host_listings(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS host_availability_blocks (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  hostListingId INT NOT NULL,
  blockType ENUM('date', 'weekday', 'all_day') NOT NULL,
  blockDate DATE NULL,
  blockWeekday INT NULL,
  mealType ENUM('lunch', 'dinner', 'both') DEFAULT 'both' NOT NULL,
  reason VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (hostListingId) REFERENCES host_listings(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS host_availability_blocks (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  hostListingId INT NOT NULL,
  blockType ENUM('date', 'weekday', 'all_day') NOT NULL,
  blockDate DATE NULL,
